sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20121" key="blh/teira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλήτ-ειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrower, darter</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀϊστῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0216.tlg001:4:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
